Bus Timings

E201 Bus Timetable Ghubaiba Bus Station to Al Ain Bus Station

December 20, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus E201 is an essential part of Dubai’s public transportation system, connecting the bustling Ghubaiba Bus Station · 12 in Dubai with the Al Ain Bus Station. This route serves both city and intercity travelers, providing a seamless link between Dubai and Al Ain.

Route Name E201
Route Description Ghubaiba Bus Station · 12 - Al Ain Bus Station
Total Distance Approximately 139 km
Total Journey Time Approximately 2 hours 28 minutes
Operational Hours 06:00 to 21:20 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 25
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus E201

Bus E201 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

From Ghubaiba Bus Station From Al Ain Bus Station
06:20 06:00
07:20 07:00
08:20 08:00
09:20 09:00
10:20 10:00
11:20 11:00
12:20 12:00
13:20 13:00
14:20 14:00
15:20 15:00
16:20 16:00
17:20 17:00
18:20 18:00
19:20 19:00
20:20 20:00
21:20 21:00

Bus E201 Timetable

For full schedule details, you can refer to the official RTA website, or simply follow this link for E201 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus E201 is in line with Dubai’s standard public transport pricing. A single journey generally costs AED 25 with a Nol Card. Prices may vary depending on the card type and travel zones. For the most accurate fare information, passengers should consult the RTA Dubai app or check at metro stations. Keep an eye out for any fare changes that might apply.

Bus Booking

Bus E201 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus directly at any of the designated stops along the route. To stay updated on real-time schedules and service information, the RTA Dubai app provides live tracking and detailed schedule information, making it easier for passengers to plan their trips effectively. The app also helps ensure you catch the bus on time.

Bus Route

The E201 bus route includes the following stops:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 12

  2. Wasl Club

  3. Emirates NBD

  4. Al Rahma Medical Center / Al Qattara Oasis East

  5. Al Kharais / Al Ain Gift Markets

  6. Al Slimi Park

  7. Eid Praying Ground

  8. Al Madina Petrol Station

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE
  1. Al Ain Bus Station

Bus E201 Station Overview

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 12

Ghubaiba Bus Station · 12 is a pivotal transit hub in Dubai, where Bus E201 makes a crucial stop. Located in the vibrant Ghubaiba area, this station is equipped with modern amenities such as comfortable seating, ticket counters, and real-time schedule displays.

Al Ain Bus Station

Al Ain Bus Station serves as a key terminal for Bus E201, providing a vital link between Dubai and the Al Ain region. This station features essential facilities including waiting areas, ticketing services, and local amenities. Its role in connecting major cities within the UAE makes it an important stop for travelers heading to or from Al Ain. The station’s comprehensive services and strategic location facilitate convenient and efficient travel, supporting both long-distance commutes and regional connections.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus E201 connects several key points in Dubai and Al Ain, with some notable attractions and destinations along its route:

  1. Ghubaiba Bus Station · 12: While not a tourist spot itself, it’s a major transit hub connecting various parts of Dubai.

  2. Wasl Club: A community sports club that may offer recreational facilities, although not a primary tourist destination.

  3. Emirates NBD: This is a prominent bank, not a tourist attraction, but its location is central for business travelers.

4.

  1. Al Kharais / Al Ain Gift Markets: This area offers local shopping experiences and traditional markets where you can explore local crafts and souvenirs.

6.

7.

  1. Al Madina Petrol Station: A standard service station; not a tourist destination but convenient for travelers in need of fuel or amenities.

  2. Al Ain Bus Station: The end point of the route and a major transportation hub in Al Ain, connecting travelers to various attractions in the city.

While this route primarily serves practical purposes, it provides access to several local markets, parks, and cultural sites that can enhance your travel experience.

Journey Experience

This route provides a unique blend of Dubai’s modernity and Al Ain’s rich heritage, making it a rewarding experience for travelers.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Al Ain Bus Station, the furthest point on the E201 bus route, starting from Ghubaiba Bus Station · 12. The ride to Al Ain Bus Station, known for its connectivity and transport facilities, is priced at approximately AED 368. This option provides a convenient and reliable way to reach your destination while staying informed about your journey through the app’s real-time updates and fare estimates.

Bus E201 provides a key link between Dubai and Al Ain, with multiple stops along the route for convenient access. Its frequent service ensures reliable travel, with a fare that fits Dubai’s standard pricing. While online booking isn’t offered, real-time updates are available via the RTA Dubai app. Check the RTA Dubai app for the latest schedule and service updates.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: December 20, 2025.
